note: Added 17 edge-case tests in WgPeerAndConfigEdgeCaseTests.cs covering: Peers collection immutability (Builder creates read-only list), empty AllowedIPs, boundary port values (0, 65535), ToString() with all optional fields (Endpoint, PresharedKey, PersistentKeepalive), singular/plural peer count, multiple AllowedIPs formatting, and null optional field defaults. All 364 tests pass.
